description: Untargeted metabolomics feature detection on centroided LC-MS data: MassTraceDetection -> ElutionPeakDetection -> FeatureFindingMetabo. Writes a featureXML and a CSV table of detected features.
rules: writes features.featureXML and features.csv under record_store
tunable via PPM, NOISE, CHARGE_LOW, CHARGE_HIGH, ISO_MODEL
KEEP_SINGLETONS=1 keeps single-trace features (default removes them)
usage: Set INPUT (centroided mzML). Optional PPM/NOISE/CHARGE_LOW/CHARGE_HIGH/KEEP_SINGLETONS/ISO_MODEL. Output: features.featureXML (+ features.csv).
limitation: Requires pyOpenMS 3.5.0 (Python 3.9+) to produce real content; if absent the porter still creates features.featureXML and records the reason.
